item.title: UPDATE: Hintermann Series H3 Total Ankle Replacement Has a Higher-Than-Expected Risk of Device Failure: FDA Safety Communication
item.description: Learn more about recommendations for patients who are considering a Hintermann Series H3 TAR system or who have one; recommendations for health care providers.
item.dc:creator: FDA

item.title: Anesthesia Kit Correction: Becton Dickinson Issues Correction for BD Spinal Trays Containing Bupivacaine Ampules
item.description: BD is correcting affected Spinal Trays by removing Bupivacaine ampule components.
item.dc:creator: FDA
